```spthy
theory running_ex_P
begin

builtins: hashing, asymmetric-encryption

// Roles

let Client(ltKc, pKs) =
  new psk;                               // fresh session key
  let xencC = aenc(psk, pKs) in          // encrypt under Server's public key
  out(xencC);
  in(H);                                 // receive purported confirmation
  if h(psk) = H then
    event SessKeyC(pKs, psk)             // Client accepts session key with Server pk
  else 0

let Server(ltKs, pKs) =
  in(xencC);                             // receive encrypted session key
  let key = adec(xencC, ltKs) in         // decrypt with Server's secret key
  event AnswerRequest(pKs, key);
  let H = h(key) in
  out(H)

process:
!(
  new ltKs; out(pk(ltKs));                              // fresh server keypair; publish pk
  !(
    new ltKc; out(pk(ltKc));                            // fresh client keypair; publish pk
      ( !Client(ltKc, pk(ltKs))                         // unbounded clients using this server
        | ( event LtkReveal(pk(ltKc)); out(pk(ltKc)) )  // branch: leak client's long-term key (identified by pk)
      )
    | ( !Server(ltKs, pk(ltKs))                         // unbounded servers (sessions) for this keypair
        | ( event LtkReveal(pk(ltKs)); out(pk(ltKs)) )  // branch: leak server's long-term key (identified by pk)
      )
  )
)

//// Lemmas ////

lemma Client_session_key_secrecy:
"
  not(
    Ex pKs psk #i #j.
      SessKeyC(pKs, psk) @ i
      & K(psk) @ j
      & not(Ex #r. LtkReveal(pKs) @ r)
  )
"

lemma Client_auth:
"
  All pKs psk #i.
    SessKeyC(pKs, psk) @ i
    ==>
      (Ex #a. AnswerRequest(pKs, psk) @ a)
      | (Ex #r. LtkReveal(pKs) @ r & r < i)
"

lemma Client_auth_injective:
"
  All pKs psk #i.
    SessKeyC(pKs, psk) @ i
    ==>
      (
        (Ex #a. AnswerRequest(pKs, psk) @ a)
        & not(Ex #i2. SessKeyC(pKs, psk) @ i2 & not(i2 = i))
      )
      | (Ex #r. LtkReveal(pKs) @ r & r < i)
"

lemma Client_session_key_honest_setup:
exists-trace
"
  Ex pKs psk #i.
    SessKeyC(pKs, psk) @ i
    & not(Ex #r. LtkReveal(pKs) @ r)
"

end
```

// Roles
